title: The Pondicherry (Administration) Act, 1962
full_text: The Pondicherry (Administration) Act, 1962 पांडिचेरी (प्रशासन) अधिनियम, 1962 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196249 Act Number: 49 Enactment Date: 1962-12-05 Act Year: 1962 Short Title: The Pondicherry (Administration) Act, 1962 Hindi Title: पांडिचेरी (प्रशासन) अधिनियम, 1962 Long Title: An Act to provide for the administration of Pondicherry and for matters connected therewith.
